zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Herries於大約1534年出生時，她的父親Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles34歲，母親Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan25歲。她於1548年3月18日之前與John Maxwell結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年3月14日在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯享年61歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Herries于大约1534年出生时，她的父亲Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles34岁，母亲Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan25岁。她于1548年3月18日之前与John Maxwell结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年3月14日在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯享年61岁，埋葬在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: Herries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, Scottish, English: locative name from Hérils in Trévières (Calvados). The name in England may have died out before the end of the medieval period, but survived into the modern period in Scotland.
2 English: variant of Herry with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Harris .

variants.name: Herry
meanings: Scots: Herry, to plunder, most properly to plunder birds' nests

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Herries was born about 1534, her father, Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles, was 34 and her mother, Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan, was 25. She married John Maxwell before 18 March 1548. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 14 March 1594, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Herries est née environ 1534, son père, Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Maxwell avant 18 mars 1548. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mars 1594, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Herries um 1534 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan 25. Sie hat vor 18. März 1548 John Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. März 1594 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland und wurde in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Herries è nata il circa 1534, sua padre, Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Maxwell prima del 18 marzo 1548. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 14 marzo 1594, nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Herriesが約1534年に生まれた時，父Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terreglesは34歳，母Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhanは25歳であった。1548年3月18日以前にJohn Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年3月14日にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスで61歳で死去し，スコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Herries(이)가 대략 1534년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1548년 3월 18일 이전 John Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 3월 14일 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Herries nasceu aproximadamente 1534, seu pai, Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maxwell antes 18 de março de 1548. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de março de 1594, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Herries родилась около 1534 г., её отцу по имени Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maxwell перед 18 марта 1548 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 14 марта 1594 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Herries nació aproximadamente 1534, su papá, Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Maxwell antes de 18 de marzo de 1548. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1594, en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.
